## Checklist

- [ ] The change is small and focused (one concern per PR)
- [ ] Follows the architecture rules in `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
      (feature folders, repository pattern, no direct imports from generated code)
- [ ] Domain logic changes include/update unit tests
- [ ] `lint`, `typecheck`, `test`, and `build` pass locally (once Phase 1 lands)
- [ ] Documentation updated where relevant (`README.md`, `plan.md`, instructions)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or environment-specific values committed
